scripts.dev: export BURNS_DESKTOP_ALLOW_ATTACH_EXISTING=1; export BURNS_DESKTOP_PREBUILD_BUN=bun; bash ./scripts/ensure-electrobun-local-dep.sh && bunx electrobun dev
scripts.build: export BURNS_DESKTOP_PREBUILD_BUN=bun; bash ./scripts/ensure-electrobun-local-dep.sh && bunx electrobun build --env=stable
scripts.build:canary: export BURNS_DESKTOP_PREBUILD_BUN=bun; bash ./scripts/ensure-electrobun-local-dep.sh && bunx electrobun build --env=canary
